title: lobelia puberula f. glabella
intro: Lobelia puberula f. glabella is a variety of the lobelia plant, specifically a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lobelia puberula f. glabella include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating anxiety and other nervous system disorders. Herbal preparations of Lobelia puberula f. glabella include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory and nervous system conditions.
